title: ophrys cornuta var. masticorum
intro: Ophrys cornuta var. masticorum, also known as the "Mastic Orchid," is a variant of the Ophrys cornuta species, a type of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ophrys cornuta var. masticorum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and topical applications.
